description: 3D playable building blocks — Three.js. Each preview rotates the live mesh in a small canvas.

categories.label: Models
categories.description: Procedural Three.js meshes — modular plane assembly + low-poly environment props.

items.name: fuselage
items.description: Tapered cylinder body + nose cone + tail cap + cockpit dome + 3-blade propeller + landing gear.

items.name: wing
items.description: Trapezoidal swept wing (span 1.5, chord 0.95→0.6 tip, sweep back 0.25). Solid 8-vertex extrusion.

items.name: tail
items.description: Vertical fin + 2 horizontal stabilisers, swept trapezoidal shapes.

items.name: tree
items.description: Bushy low-poly tree: tapered cylinder trunk + 2 icosphere foliage blobs, vertex-colour tints.

items.name: grass-tuft
items.description: Procedural canvas-textured plane: 7 gradient blades per tuft, alpha-tested.

items.name: fence-marker
items.description: Distance milestone: 7 wooden poles + cross-beam + checkered banner above.

categories.label: VFX
categories.description: 3D crash explosion + camera rumble (port of LowPolyWar destruction).

items.name: crash-explosion
items.description: Flash icosa + fire core + ring shockwave + scorch decal + point light + dust puffs. ~140 LOC.

items.name: camera-shake
items.description: Decay-based jitter on camera position over 850ms. Intensity 1.6 on impact.

items.name: fragment-physics
items.description: 36 box fragments, 8-corner ground projection + restitution 0.32 + friction 0.78 + ang damp 0.94.

items.name: drag-throw-3d
items.description: Drag-and-release input mapped to 3D launch direction (pitch + yaw + power, clamped half-plane).

items.name: glide-physics
items.description: Lift perpendicular to velocity, AoA-modulated, capped at 0.78×g; sink-rate floor.

items.name: keyboard-control
items.description: ↑/↓ rotate fuselage (AoA pilot input) + ←/→ yaw drift. Smoothed inputs, ~400ms ramp.

items.name: chase-camera
items.description: Behind-and-above third-person camera, eased lerp on position + lookAt with shake hookup.

categories.label: HUD
categories.description: DOM overlays for the 3D playable. Lightweight, no canvas.

items.name: coin-counter
items.description: Top-right balance pill with golden coin icon + bouncy +N popup on earn.

items.name: speedometer
items.description: Round 64×64 KM/H gauge, white arc fills 0→120, neutral aviation style.

items.name: evolution-shop
items.description: Parts dock with cost in coins, owned/affordable/cantafford visual states.

items.name: play-store-cta
items.description: Final upgrade purchase replaces the dock with a pulsing green Play Store button.

items.name: title-banner
items.description: Top-left game title overlay, plain text with subtle shadow.
